name: InsForge
description: Backend platform built for AI agents to build and ship fullstack applications. Provides authentication, database, storage, functions, and AI integrations in seconds. Open source with 2.3K+ GitHub stars. Helps turn coding agents into full-stack engineers. Ranked #1 Product of the Day with 545 upvotes.
community_quotes: Turn your coding agent into full-stack engineer
Backend still slows down development even with AI coding agents - InsForge solves this gap

name: Firecrawl CLI
description: An all-in-one CLI toolkit for scraping, searching, and browsing the web, specifically built for AI agents and developers. Provides clean, reliable data with a Browser Sandbox feature. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.
community_quotes: The complete web data toolkit for AI agents

name: CodeYam CLI & Memory
description: Comprehensive memory management for Claude Code. Uses a background agent to review coding session transcripts, identifies confusion patterns, and generates targeted rules to improve coding efficiency. Runs locally without registration. Received 137 upvotes.
community_quotes: Comprehensive memory management for Claude Code
Claude Code kept repeating the same mistakes - this tool solves that

name: Sonarly
description: AI agents that triage alerts, deduplicate noise, and fix production bugs with full context autonomously. Part of Y Combinator W26 batch. Designed to save developers from emergency production fixes. Received 143 upvotes.
community_quotes: The AI that fixes prod autonomously

name: Spine Swarm
description: Manages a team of AI agents that do real work together. Coordinates multiple AI coding agents for complex tasks including web browsing. Visual workspace for deploying swarms of AI agents. Received 163 upvotes.
community_quotes: Manage and deploy swarms of AI agents

name: Claude Code Review
description: Multi-agent review system that catches bugs early in AI-generated code. Received 467 upvotes on Product Hunt, indicating strong community interest in automated code review for AI-generated code.
community_quotes: Multi-agent review catching bugs early in AI-generated code

name: Unblocked
description: Gets AI agents to generate code that fits your system architecture and constraints. Provides context to AI coding agents to save time and tokens. Surfaces context from your entire repo, Slack, Jira, documentation, and PR history.
community_quotes: Giving your agents the context to save time and tokens
The context layer for AI-driven development

name: Agent Skills
description: Finds and integrates skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and other AI coding tools. Part of the emerging Agent Skills open standard that allows AI coding assistants to perform agentic tasks.
community_quotes: Agent skills follow an open standard across Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot

name: Pulldog
description: A native macOS application for organizing code reviews from GitHub and GitLab. Provides a single place to monitor all code reviews with smart queries and filters. Connects to GitHub & GitLab and aggregates multiple accounts into one seamless inbox.
community_quotes: A Mac app to keep your code reviews organized
Connects to GitHub & GitLab for a unified code review inbox

name: Claude Marketplace
description: Helps companies easily discover and acquire the AI tools they need for development workflows. Streamlines procurement of AI development tools.

name: Clean Clode
description: Instantly cleans Claude Code and Codex terminal output. Improves readability of AI coding agent output in the terminal.

name: Aura
description: Semantic version control for AI coding agents on top of Git. Provides versioning and tracking for AI-generated code changes.

name: CtrlAI
description: Transparent proxy that secures AI agents with guardrails. Provides security and governance for AI coding agents in production environments.
